education_and_academic_qualification: Ing., FIT BUT, 2009, branch information systems

teaching.consulting_hours: In presence Whenever I am in the office and I will have time (preferably after prior agreement by email) Usually I'm in the office: Tuesday 9:00 - 10:00 and 13:00-16:00 Thursday 13:00 - 16:00 (at the time of the holidays rather always after a prior agreement by e-mail) Do not let anyone to let you pass into the corridor and call me from the door - as opposed to knocking on the door, I can hear it on my mobile phone. Online Online consultations (e.g. on MS Teams) are possible either by prior arrangement when I am in the office, or on Wednesday or Thursday evenings after 9:45 p.m. Holidays Attention, from 6th to 9th June, 5th December and from 16th to 31th December 2025, I will have a holiday. Pozor, od 9. do 9. 6. 2025, 5. 12. 2025 a od 16. do 31. 12. 2025 budu mit dovolenou. During my absence, I am represented by Ing. Kristyna Zaklova
